description:
You are a monitoring-operations specialist who has just received an application
    log at /home/user/logs/app.log.  
    1. Inspect that file and isolate every line that matches EITHER of the two alert
       patterns shown below (use extended regular expressions, case-sensitive):
           •   CRITICAL            (the literal word)  
           •   ERROR 5[0-9]{2}     (the word “ERROR” followed by any 5xx status code)

    2. Preserve the original chronological order of those matched lines and write
       them—unaltered—into a brand-new file located at  
       /home/user/alerts/critical_errors.log  (create the alerts directory if it
       does not yet exist).

    3. After the very last matched line, append ONE additional summary line in the
       exact format shown here (substitute N with the real count of matched lines):
           ==TOTAL== N

       • There must be two “=” signs on each side, no spaces inside “TOTAL”, one
         single space before N, and N must be the decimal number of matched lines.
       • There should be a single trailing newline at the end of the file.

    Rules & expectations:
       • You may use any standard command-line utilities available in a typical
         Linux environment (e.g., grep/egrep, mkdir, tee, etc.).  
       • The whole task can be accomplished with only two or three shell commands.  
       • Do NOT modify the original /home/user/logs/app.log file.  
       • The automated checker will read /home/user/alerts/critical_errors.log and
         verify that  
           – every kept line matches one of the two regexes,  
           – the order is the same as in the source log, and  
           – the summary line contains the correct total.

    When you are done, simply exit—no additional output is required.
truth:
<!-- Pre-existing file & its exact content -->
    <file path="/home/user/logs/app.log"><![CDATA[
2024-06-01 10:12:33 INFO User login succeeded
2024-06-01 10:15:41 ERROR 404 Page not found
2024-06-01 10:17:02 WARNING Disk space low
2024-06-01 10:20:11 CRITICAL Database connection lost
2024-06-01 10:25:59 ERROR 500 Internal server error
2024-06-01 10:30:12 INFO Scheduled backup completed
2024-06-01 10:35:44 ERROR 502 Bad gateway
2024-06-01 10:40:23 DEBUG Cache cleared
]]></file>

    <!-- File that must be produced by the agent -->
    <expected_file path="/home/user/alerts/critical_errors.log"><![CDATA[
2024-06-01 10:20:11 CRITICAL Database connection lost
2024-06-01 10:25:59 ERROR 500 Internal server error
2024-06-01 10:35:44 ERROR 502 Bad gateway
==TOTAL== 3
]]></expected_file>

    <!-- Directory that must be created by the agent (if absent) -->
    <expected_directory path="/home/user/alerts"/>
